allow:
Bash(codex exec --full-auto -C "c:\\Users\\VM-Dev\\Desktop\\watch-tower" -o "c:\\Users\\VM-Dev\\Desktop\\watch-tower\\codex-result.txt" "TASK: Add a getLogLevel function to the logger module

SCOPE: packages/shared/src/logger.ts

CONTEXT:
- The file already has setLogLevel\(level\) function at line 12
- currentLevel variable holds the state at line 10
- Follow the same export pattern as setLogLevel

PATTERN:
export const setLogLevel = \(level: LogLevel\) => {
  currentLevel = level;
};

OUTPUT:
- Add getLogLevel function that returns the current LogLevel
- Place it right after setLogLevel
- Export it

CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT modify any other files
- Match existing code style \(arrow function, same formatting\)
")

hooks.command: if [[ -f package.json ]] && npm run test:quick --silent >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '✅ Tests passed'; else echo '⚠️ Tests may need attention'; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.js || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]] && [[ -f package.json ]]; then npm test 2>/dev/null || yarn test 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]] && [[ -f pytest.ini || -f setup.cfg || -f pyproject.toml ]]; then pytest "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || python -m pytest "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.rb ]] && [[ -f Gemfile ]]; then bundle exec rspec "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND" | grep -qE '^git\s+commit'; then python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/secret-scanner.py 2>&1; fi
